case_title: ALEXANDER POULOS ET AL VS. JEN-CHIEH LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,950.00 FILED BY POULOS, ALEXANDER WILLIAMS, DYLAN CHELLURI, KARNA AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEN-CHIEH AKA JENNIFER LEE TIEN, CHIH-TING AKA AMY LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-09-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS ALEXANDER POULOS DYLAN WILLIAMS, AND KARNA CHELLURI ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JEN-CHIEH LEE AND CHIH-TING AKA JENNIFER LEE AND CHIH-TING AKA AMY LEE TIEN ARE NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR JEN-CHIEH LEE IS VALED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR CHIH-TING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SAMUEL FENG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF ALEXANDER POULOS RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF POULOS, ALEXANDER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFFS ALEXANDER POULOS AND KARNA CHELLURI ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DYLAN WILLIAMS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JEN-CHIEH LEE AKA JENNIFER LEE AND CHIH-TING TIEN AKA AMY LEE ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS DISMISS THEIR CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT CHIH-TING TIEN AKA AMY LEE AS THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
(SC-221) RESPONSE ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF POULOS, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEN-CHIEH AKA JENNIFER LEE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF KARNA CHELLURI RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHELLURI, KARNA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS DENIED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$250.00) SERVED MAY-01-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEN-CHIEH AKA JENNIFER LEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POULOS, ALEXANDER CHELLURI, KARNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, JEN-CHIEH AKA JENNIFER LEE $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $325.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,825.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-220(REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS) FINANCIAL STATEMENT IS ON FILE. FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, JEN-CHIEH AKA JENNIFER LEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2024 - JUDGMENT.
